Nolan Vu

#### What's great

Fin handles the bread-and-butter support stuff really well, FAQ-type questions, order status, basic troubleshooting, without needing much hand-holding once the knowledge base is set up properly. The resolution rate we saw in the first month was better than expected, and the handoff to a human agent when Fin can't handle something felt smooth. [...] Where it gets tricky is when customers ask slightly off-script questions or need something that requires looking up account-specific details from an external system. The integration setup to make that work isn't super plug-and-play, and you'll need someone reasonably technical to configure it right.

Pricing scales with usage so it can get expensive fast once volume picks up. Worth it if you're drowning in tier-1 tickets, but probably harder to justify for smaller teams where a human can genuinely keep up.

#### What needs improvement

#### vs Alternatives

AI Hive 

This product is among the best options for AI Agent I have seen for a long time, better than my own hunted solution: AI HIve

Equility is seed-stage startup that is focused on building a centralized platform that connects to your digital apps, automates data entries, and provides a real-time audit of your accounting accuracy. Our platform recently received investment from the Techstars accelerator and we are activity looking for investment partners to help spur our innovation and the benefits that we can provide to the accounting community. Email mnieto@equilityhq.com to learn more.
